title: Refreshed Stuff
description: A fresh reskin of the Minecraft UI!
body:
[![Available on CurseForge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e2b4fa9a8b8a48353a916f6aef5c185bdedb63c.png)](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/refreshed-hearts)

This pack changes the appearance of some of Minecraft s UI, making elements use hue-shifted shading and some other cool-looking tricks!

I made this for personal use, but I decided to make it available for everyone to download and use.

**This pack will only be for 1.21.1!**

Thanks for downloading!

Report issues at https://forms.gle/D1bhuFHSTaCnAfsj9
